Game: The Firemen 1994-09-09T00:00:00-07:00 This fire is alive - and it's racing straight towards you! A fire has broken out in a high-tech chemical factory, where a highly explosive chemical, MDL, is being developed. It's up to you and your fire-fighting team to save the people trapped in the building, and stop the fire from reaching the MDL. Because if it does, the whole building is going to blow... 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/98ae1f59-1fbc-4482-b8b1-cf638d907f50.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/15fc98d4-1f1c-4bc9-8f59-d1c73b0b7402.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/bb99e67b-0d57-454e-b55e-6d72003eda3d.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/cb73f011-9091-4bf0-b038-1f8213e24585.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/89786d95-b7b3-4d1a-8584-4cee5d61196b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/fcedd941-b14b-4771-8d82-8bbc4ebf6a15.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/934efd2f-1069-479a-8d3a-042f294f077c.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/5607f5a3-e3b1-4f7f-abd2-0ab5866ba3bd.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/f29fd2c6-51b5-42a5-90fa-0dbee4bf60c8.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/f84239b1-863c-4ab6-a150-671a7ce8dc65.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/792b5b00-a190-48ee-a1db-94795a08f87e.png 3.5 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Firemen Not Rated Action; Shooter Human Entertainment Human Entertainment
